scripts.dev:api:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev build api
scripts.dev:api:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev up -d api
scripts.dev:api:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev logs -f api
scripts.dev:front:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev build front
scripts.dev:front:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev up -d front
scripts.dev:front:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile dev logs -f front
scripts.prod:api:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod build api
scripts.prod:api:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod up -d api
scripts.prod:api:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod logs -f api
scripts.prod:front:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod build front
scripts.prod:front:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod up -d front
scripts.prod:front:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod logs -f front
scripts.prod:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile prod down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up --profile prod --build -d
